Secondary Endpoint(s).value: biochemical progression-free survival (bPFS) and radiographic progression-free survival (rPFS)
Secondary Endpoint(s).evidence: Page 1 abstract states 'Secondary end points were biochemical progression-free survival (bPFS) and radiographic progression-free survival (rPFS)'. A's value is verbatim from the abstract, while B uses a comma instead of 'and'.

Treatment Arm 1 Regimen.value: ADT plus D (75 mg/m² for 21 d, up to nine cycles)
Treatment Arm 1 Regimen.evidence: Page 2, section '2. Patients and methods', states 'ADT plus D (75 mg/m² for 21 d, up to nine cycles)'. A's value is verbatim, while B replaces 'D' with 'Docetaxel', which is an interpretation.

Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1.evidence: Page 1 abstract clearly states 'Androgen Deprivation Therapy (ADT) Plus Docetaxel'. Docetaxel is chemotherapy and ADT is hormone therapy, making B more complete and accurate.
Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1.group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

Primary Endpoint(s).evidence: Page 1 abstract and section 2.1 state 'Primary end point was OS'. B provides the full name 'Overall Survival (OS)', which is more complete.

Treatment Arm(s).evidence: The title on page 1 uses 'Androgen Deprivation Therapy (ADT) Plus Docetaxel', while the abstract uses 'ADT plus D'. B uses the full name 'ADT plus Docetaxel', which is more complete.

Median Follow-Up Duration (mo).evidence: Both sources provide the correct numerical value. B includes 'mo' which is explicitly stated on page 1 and 3, making it slightly more complete.
